channel.title: china-static:politics
channel.description: Static RSS merge for china variant (politics)

item.title: Congress passes war powers measure for first time, rebuking Trump's war with Iran
item.dc:creator: BBC World
item.description: The resolution is largely symbolic, but it adds to pressure on the White House to end the conflict once and for all.

item.title: Drowning deaths soar in France as Europe buckles in peak of heatwave
item.dc:creator: BBC World
item.description: Forty people have drowned in heatwave-related deaths in France since last Thursday, Prime Minister Sébastien Lecornu says.

item.title: UN says it will evacuate sailors stranded in Strait of Hormuz, as Rubio warns against tolls
item.dc:creator: BBC World
item.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio warned Iran that no country can charge fees for ships to travel through the strait.

item.title: Clean sweep for Mamdani-backed candidates in New York's Democratic primary
item.dc:creator: BBC World
item.description: Brad Lander unseats Dan Goldman in a race that laid bare the city's divisions over the Israel-Gaza war.

item.title: Sydney woman wakes from induced coma more than a week after shark attack
item.dc:creator: BBC World
item.description: Leah Stewart, 34, had one of her arms amputated after she was bitten while swimming at Coogee Beach.

item.title: Dozens of ships head through Strait of Hormuz after US-Iran deal
item.dc:creator: BBC World
item.description: Traffic in the waterway has risen since the US and Iran signed a deal aimed at ending the war, including 42 ships on Saturday alone.

item.title: Eight sentenced to 450 years in prison over anti-ICE riot where officer was shot
item.dc:creator: BBC World
item.description: An officer was shot in the neck during the Texas disorder by "Antifa Cell operatives", prosecutors said.

item.title: Bondi Beach shooting hero pleads not guilty to alleged assault on his father
item.dc:creator: BBC World
item.description: Ahmed al Ahmed tackled one of the gunmen who killed 15 people at a Jewish event in December.

item.title: Germany rail network briefly halted nationwide due to IT malfunction
item.dc:creator: BBC World
item.description: Rail company Deutsche Bahn had to pause train services across the country for more than two-and-a-half hours.

item.title: Israeli troops kill two in south Lebanon after lull in fighting, authorities say
item.dc:creator: BBC World
item.description: Israel's military says the two men were Hezbollah operatives, but the Iran-backed group accuses it of a ceasefire violation.

item.title: 當影像流水線走到極致——中國AI短劇是怎樣煉成的？
item.dc:creator: BBC中文
item.description: 中國的短劇行業在短短一年內出現翻天覆地的變化，AI製成品佔據了最熱門短劇的四成，量產的速成也以幾何級增長，但真人演員在這個洪流中被迅速淘汰。

item.title: 被列軍工名單 阿里巴巴狀告美國國防部
item.dc:creator: BBC中文
item.description: 美國國防部將阿里巴巴列入支持中國解放軍企業家名單，公司在遞交加州法院的訴訟文件中反駁「毫無根據」。

item.title: 聯合國擬撤離霍爾木茲海峽滯留船員，盧比奧警告伊朗勿收費
item.dc:creator: BBC中文
item.description: 聯合國國際海事組織表示，目前有超過1.1萬名船員滯留霍爾木茲海峽一帶。

item.title: 十年六個——英國首相換了又換為甚麼？
item.dc:creator: BBC中文
item.description: 施紀賢爵士成為了十年來第六位離任的英國首相，BBC國際部記者沃森（Rob Watson）剖析政治動盪的背後原因。

item.title: 你知道你的「流汗評分」嗎？來看補水技術的崛起
item.dc:creator: BBC中文
item.description: 市面上充斥著各種水分追蹤設備，但這會不會是資訊過載了？

item.title: 點擊瀏覽即時更新
item.dc:creator: BBC中文
item.description: 精彩進球、即時比數、賽程和結果萬勿錯過

item.title: 價值2.5億美元的金礦——補水暫停廣告將成世界盃新常態？
item.dc:creator: BBC中文
item.description: BBC體育部剖析補水暫停時段廣告在世界各地如何操作，以及這能將對足球的未來帶來甚麼程度的影響。

item.title: 「上帝之手」40週年：馬拉多納的第二個入球呢？
item.dc:creator: BBC中文
item.description: 那是BBC記者洛德絲·赫萊迪亞（Lourdes Heredia）首次現場觀看足球比賽，而這場世界盃賽事恰好成為體壇史上最具爭議事件之一。

item.title: 世界盃品牌大戰：Nike對決Adidas
item.dc:creator: BBC中文
item.description: 令人瞠目結舌的預算早已不是什麼新鮮事，但今年耐克和阿迪達斯為了爭奪世界盃的關注度，都採取了比以往任何時候都更加大膽和鋪張的策略。

item.title: 2026足球世界盃賽程海報 點擊這裡免費下載
item.dc:creator: BBC中文
item.description: 你可以從這裡下載並打印免費的2026世界盃賽程海報，全面追蹤這項全球最大足球盛事的每一場賽程與比賽結果。

item.title: Kenyan Health Minister orders halt of construction of US Ebola facility
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Kenya’s Health Minister has stopped the construction of a US Ebola facility in Kenya.

item.title: Ghana celebrates after holding nervous England to 0-0 draw
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Ghanaians took to the streets in celebration after the Black Stars held England to a 0-0 draw at the World Cup.

item.title: Cristiano Ronaldo becomes first player to score in six World Cups
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Cristiano Ronaldo scored twice in Portugal’s 5-0 win over Uzbekistan

item.title: Kilts and bagpipes flood Miami streets as Scotland prepare to face Brazil
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Kilts and bagpipes flood Miami streets as Scotland prepare to face Brazil.

item.title: Munoz sends Colombia into World Cup knockouts with 1-0 win over DR Congo
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Daniel Munoz's 76th-minute goal guided Colombia to a Group K win over DR Congo, sending them to the round of 32.

item.title: NBA Draft 2026: Wizards select teen sensation AJ Dybantsa with No. 1 pick
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: The 6ft 8in (2.03m) 19-year-old forward was scooped by the Wizards after playing just one season of college basketball.

item.title: Which teams have qualified for the World Cup 2026 knockouts, round of 32?
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: The 2026 FIFA World Cup knockout stage format, criteria and rules for qualification. Find out who's in and who's out.

item.title: China takes US crown on ranking of world’s fastest supercomputers
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: China’s LineShine overtakes US-based El Capitan as most powerful supercomputer, according to the TOP500 list.

item.title: Trump claims US recouped Venezuela war costs 28 times over
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: US President Donald Trump claimed the United States has recovered its costs 28 times over through oil extraction.

item.title: Prada plays a part in designing NASA’s lunar mission spacesuits
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: NASA astronauts plan to return to the moon in 2028 wearing spacesuits made with more safety features and mobility.
